/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/AlpineGui.dir/AlpineGui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineGui.dir/AsyncRpcClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineGui.dir/GuiPanels.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineGui.dir/GuiHelpers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineGui.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineGui.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineGui.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineGui.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineGui.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineGui.dir/vendor/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineGui.dir/vendor/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineGui.dir/__/AlpineRestBridge/JsonWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineGui.dir/__/AlpineRestBridge/JsonReader.cpp.o -o ../bin/AlpineGui  ../lib/libNetUtils.a ../lib/libglfw3.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo ../lib/libThreadUtils.a ../lib/libSysUtils.a ../lib/libAppUtils.a -ldl ../lib/libspdlog.a ../lib/libminiupnpc.a -framework CoreFoundation
